description: Pinned corpus: the Swiss Code of Obligations (Obligationenrecht, OR / SR 220), consolidated version in force 2026-01-01, fetched from the Fedlex filestore (official federal law portal). One law, multiple official language versions. The date pins the consolidation; if Fedlex publishes a newer consolidation the checksum changes and the corpus version is bumped deliberately.
law: SR 220 — Bundesgesetz betreffend die Ergänzung des Schweizerischen Zivilgesetzbuches (Fünfter Teil: Obligationenrecht)
